title: Translate vetted first aid for burns guidance into Bengali
context: Community health workers need vetted first aid for burns guidance in Bengali. Use a vetted public-health source (e.g. WHO/MoH); verify the source licence permits translation/derivatives and record it — do NOT assume CC-BY. Include the required source attribution and any mandated translation disclaimer.
objective: Produce an accurate Bengali translation of vetted first aid for burns guidance, preserving medical terminology.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewed by a qualified Bengali-speaking reviewer (risk-tier: medium)
Source licence verified to permit translation + attribution/disclaimer recorded (not relicensed as CC-BY unless the source allows)
